body: import org.junit.Test;
import org.evosuite.runtime.EvoRunnerParameters;
import org.junit.runner.RunWith;
import org.evosuite.runtime.EvoRunner;
import org.apache.commons.codec.net.PercentCodec;
import static org.evosuite.runtime.EvoAssertions.*;
import static org.junit.Assert.*;

translation: # Objects of type java.lang.Object cannot be Percent encoded
assert isinstance(e, TypeError), "Expected TypeError, but got {}".format(type(e))
assert str(e) == "Objects of type java.lang.Object cannot be Percent encoded", "Unexpected error message"
# Objects of type java.lang.Object cannot be Percent decoded
assert isinstance(e, TypeError), "Expected TypeError, but got {}".format(type(e))
assert str(e) == "Objects of type object cannot be Percent encoded", "Unexpected exception message"
assert isinstance(e, DecoderException), "Expected DecoderException, but got {}".format(type(e))
assert str(e) == "Objects of type PercentCodec cannot be Percent decoded", "Unexpected exception message"
# Invalid URL encoding: not a valid digit (radix 16): 0
assert str(e) == "Invalid percent decoding: ", "Invalid exception message"
